# services.warpgate

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.warpgate`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.warpgate.databaseUrlFile` | `null or string` | Path to file containing database connection string with credentials. Should be a one line file with: `database_url: <protocol>://<username>:<password>@<host>/<database>`. See [SeaORM documentation](https://www.sea-ql.org/SeaORM/docs/install-and-config/connection/). |
| `services.warpgate.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Warpgate. This module will initialize Warpgate base on your config automatically. Please run `warpgate recover-access` to gain access. |
| `services.warpgate.package` | `package` | The warpgate package to use. |
| `services.warpgate.settings` | `open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Warpgate configuration. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.database_url` | `null or string` | Database connection string. See [SeaORM documentation](https://www.sea-ql.org/SeaORM/docs/install-and-config/connection/). |
| `services.warpgate.settings.external_host` | `null or string` | Configure the domain name of this Warpgate instance. See [HTTP domain binding](https://warpgate.null.page/http-domain-binding/). This option is considered legacy, please use protocol specific `external_host` instead. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.certificate` | `string` | Path to HTTPS listener certificate. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.cookie_max_age` | `string` | How long until logged in cookie expires. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.external_host` | `null or string` | The HTTP listener is reachable via this domain name externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.external_port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The HTTP listener is reachable via this port externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.key` | `string` | Path to HTTPS listener private key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.listen` | `string` | Listen endpoint of HTTP listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.session_max_age` | `string` | How long until a logged in session expires. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.sni_certificates` | `list of (open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value))` | Certificates for additional domains. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.sni_certificates.*.certificate` | `string` | Path to certificate. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.sni_certificates.*.key` | `string` | Path to private key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.http.trust_x_forwarded_headers` | `boolean` | Trust X-Forwarded-\* headers. Required when being reverse proxied. See [Running behind a reverse proxy](https://warpgate.null.page/reverse-proxy/). |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.certificate` | `string` | Path to Kubernetes listener certificate. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kubernetes listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.external_host` | `null or string` | The Kubernetes listener is reachable via this domain name externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.external_port` | `null or string` | The Kubernetes listener is reachable via this port externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.key` | `string` | Path to Kubernetes listener private key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.listen` | `string` | Listen endpoint of Kubernetes listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.kubernetes.session_max_age` | `string` | How long until a logged in session expires. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.log.audit_retention` | `string` | How long Warpgate keeps its audit logs. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.log.format` | `one of "text", "json"` | The format Warpgate emits logs in. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.log.retention` | `string` | How long Warpgate keeps its non-audit logs and session recordings. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.log.send_to` | `null or string` | Path of UNIX socket of log forwarder. See [Log forwarding](https://warpgate.null.page/log-forwarding/); |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.certificate` | `string` | Path to MySQL listener certificate. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable MySQL listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.external_host` | `null or string` | The MySQL listener is reachable via this domain name externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.external_port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The MySQL listener is reachable via this port externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.key` | `string` | Path to MySQL listener private key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.mysql.listen` | `string` | Listen endpoint of MySQL listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.certificate` | `string` | Path to PostgreSQL listener certificate. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable PostgreSQL listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.external_host` | `null or string` | The PostgreSQL listener is reachable via this domain name externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.external_port` | `null or string` | The PostgreSQL listener is reachable via this port externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.key` | `string` | Path to PostgreSQL listener private key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.postgres.listen` | `string` | Listen endpoint of PostgreSQL listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.recordings.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable session recording. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.recordings.path` | `string` | Path to store session recordings. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SSH listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.external_host` | `null or string` | The SSH listener is reachable via this domain name externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.external_port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The SSH listener is reachable via this port externally. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.host_key_verification` | `one of "prompt", "auto_accept", "auto_reject"` | Specify host key verification action when connecting to a SSH target with unknown/differing host key. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.inactivity_timeout` | `string` | How long can user be inactive until Warpgate terminates the connection. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.keepalive_interval` | `null or string` | If nothing is received from the client for this amount of time, server will send a keepalive message. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.keys` | `string` | Path to store SSH host & client keys. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.ssh.listen` | `string` | Listen endpoint of SSH listener. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers` | `list of (open submodule of (YAML 1.1 value))` | Configure OIDC single sign-on providers. Main documentation can be found [here](https://warpgate.null.page/sso). |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.auto_create_users` | `boolean` | Whether to create user automatically at first SSO login. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.label` | `null or string` | SSO provider name displayed on login page. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.name` | `string` | Internal identifier of SSO provider. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.provider` | `attribute set of (YAML 1.1 value)` | SSO provider configurations. See [here](https://github.com/warp-tech/warpgate/blob/ffc755f0137944bd39cf4cbce90f4279da500943/config-schema.json#L430) for all acceptable options. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.return_domain_whitelist` | `null or (list of string)` | Controls the SSO return URL supplied to SSO provider. This will also required you to connect to this instance via whitelisted domain when doing SSO login. |
| `services.warpgate.settings.sso_providers.*.return_url_prefix` | `one of "@", "_"` | Controls the SSO return URL supplied to SSO provider. Useful for providers that do not allow the @ sign in the URL (e.g. Azure). |
